ai-rag.title: AI Search
ai-rag.description: Create AI-powered search experiences with your data to deliver natural language answers in your applications.

ai-rag.create_rag.sources.filter_items.d: Path filtering allows you to control which files or URLs are indexed by defining include and exclude patterns. Use this to limit indexing to specific content or to skip files you do not want searchable.
ai-rag.create_rag.sources.filter_items.i: All items except those matching exclude patterns are indexed (e.g., **/blog/*)
ai-rag.create_rag.sources.filter_items.e: All items except those matching exclude patterns are indexed (e.g., **/admin/*)
ai-rag.create_rag.sources.r2.title: Choose an R2 bucket
ai-rag.create_rag.sources.r2.description: Select the R2 bucket where your data is stored.
ai-rag.create_rag.sources.r2.create: Create a new bucket in R2
ai-rag.create_rag.sources.br.title: Choose a website to parse
ai-rag.create_rag.sources.br.r2_bucket: Select the R2 bucket where your data is stored.
ai-rag.create_rag.sources.br.parser_opti: Loads the page like a browser. Recommended if your content loads dynamically. Note this will be included in your Browser Rendering usage and billing.
Loads just the basic HTML. Provides faster parsing, but may miss content that appears after the page loads.

The domain needs to belong to this account.
Failed to fetch robots.txt: The file is inaccessible.
Failed to fetch your sitemap: The file is inaccessible.
Convert embedded image content during parsing.

Which links to follow when crawling.
Maximum age of cached content in seconds (0-604,800).
Follow links to subdomains of the source domain.
ai-rag.create_rag.retrive_generation.mod: Select an LLM to generate the response. Note this will be included in your model's usage and billing.
ai-rag.create_rag.retrive_generation.rew: Select an LLM to rewrite your queries to improve retrieval. Note this will be included in your model's usage and billing.
ai-rag.create_rag.retrive_generation.ret: Boost search results by ranking documents with specific metadata field values higher.
ai-rag.create_rag.finalize.token.descrip: This enables AI Search to create and access resources in your account
ai-rag.create_rag.finalize.token.auto_cr: A new token will be created automatically
ai-rag.create_rag.finalize.token.permiss: Zone: Workers Routes (edit) for all zones
ai-rag.settings.resources.title: Resources
ai-rag.settings.resources.description: Configure the resources connected to your AI Search.
ai-rag.settings.resources.ai_gateway.dra: Connect an AI Gateway to monitor and control your model usage, or create a new AI Gateway.
ai-rag.settings.resources.source.title: Data source
ai-rag.settings.resources.filter_items.d: Path filtering allows you to control which files or URLs are indexed by defining include and exclude patterns. Use this to limit indexing to specific content or to skip files you do not want searchable.
ai-rag.settings.resources.filter_items.n: Updating the path filter settings will trigger a full re-index of your AI Search instance after you Save.
ai-rag.settings.parser_options.title: Parser options
ai-rag.settings.parser_options.descripti: Configure parser options for your AI Search.
ai-rag.settings.parser_options.extractio: Choose how content is fetched from your website:
Updating the parse options settings will trigger a full re-index of your AI Search instance after you Save.
ai-rag.settings.parser_options.custom_he: Add extra headers to be used in crawling:
Updating the extra headers settings will trigger a full re-index of your AI Search instance after you Save.
ai-rag.settings.parser_options.specific_: Specify specific sitemap URLs to crawl instead of using the default sitemap discovery.
Updating the specific sitemaps settings will trigger a full re-index of your AI Search instance after you Save.
ai-rag.settings.parser_options.content_s: Define path-to-selector mappings to extract specific content from crawled pages. Each entry pairs a URL glob pattern with a CSS selector. The first matching path wins. Only the matched HTML fragment is stored and indexed.
Updating the content selectors settings will trigger a full re-index of your AI Search instance after you Save.
ai-rag.settings.parser_options.include_i: Convert embedded image content during parsing.
A new indexing job will be created to re-index all items within this instance with this configuration. The existing version of the items will still be available to query while the job is completing.
ai-rag.settings.parser_options.crawl_opt: Configure how the crawler traverses your website.
ai-rag.settings.embedding.title: Embedding
ai-rag.settings.embedding.description: Configure how your data is chunked and transformed into vector embeddings.
ai-rag.settings.chunking.title: Chunking
ai-rag.settings.chunking.description: Improve the efficiency of your AI Search by adjusting the chunk size
ai-rag.settings.chunking.drawer.title: Chunking
ai-rag.settings.chunking.chunk_size.desc: Controls the number of tokens per chunk. Affects search precision and context. Min %{min} tokens - Max %{max} tokens.
ai-rag.settings.chunking.chunk_overlap.d: Controls the amount of overlap between chunks to keep related information together. Min 0% - Max 30%.
ai-rag.settings.chunking.chunk_overlap.n: Updating the chunking settings will trigger a full re-index of your AI Search instance after you Save.
ai-rag.settings.cache.title: Similarity caching
ai-rag.settings.cache.description: Enable and configure caching to improve performance by reusing similar results.
ai-rag.settings.cache.purge_cache_descri: Invalidate all cached search results for this instance.
ai-rag.settings.cache.purge_cache_confir: This will invalidate all cached search results for this instance. New queries will be processed without cache until the cache is rebuilt. This action cannot be undone.
ai-rag.settings.cache.drawer.title: Similarity caching
ai-rag.settings.query_rewrite.title: Query rewrite
ai-rag.settings.query_rewrite.descriptio: Enable and configure query rewriting to improve accuracy before retrieval.
ai-rag.settings.retrieval.title: Retrieval
ai-rag.settings.retrieval.description: Configure thresholds and limits for retrieving the most relevant chunks from your index.
ai-rag.settings.retrieval.match_threshol: Control the minimum score required for a result to be considered a match. Higher = stricter matching.
ai-rag.settings.retrieval.max_results.de: Control the maximum number of results that can be returned for each query. Higher = more results.
ai-rag.settings.retrieval.boost_by.title: Boost by
ai-rag.settings.retrieval.boost_by.descr: Boost search results by ranking documents with specific metadata field values higher.
ai-rag.settings.retrieval.boost_by.no_fi: No fields available. Add custom metadata fields first.
ai-rag.settings.retrieval.boost_by.drawe: Boost search ranking by metadata field values. Numeric and datetime fields support ascending/descending sorting. Text and boolean fields only support exists/not exists.
ai-rag.settings.search_configuration.des: Configure the model and system prompt used to generate responses.
ai-rag.settings.search_configuration.not: Adding a system prompt will override the default. <0>Learn more</0> about customizing system prompts.
ai-rag.settings.reranking.title: Reranking
ai-rag.settings.reranking.description: Enable and configure result reranking to improve relevance of retrieved results.
ai-rag.settings.reranking.drawer.title: Reranking model
ai-rag.settings.reranking.drawer.descrip: Select a model to rerank retrieved results. Note this will be included in your model's usage and billing.
ai-rag.settings.hybrid_search.title: Hybrid search
ai-rag.settings.hybrid_search.descriptio: Enable hybrid search to combine vector and keyword search for improved results.
ai-rag.settings.hybrid_search.confirm_de: A new indexing job will be created to re-index all items within this instance with this configuration. The existing version of the items will still be available to query while the job is completing.
ai-rag.settings.hybrid_search.keyword_to: Updating the keyword tokenizer settings will trigger a full re-index of your AI Search instance after you Save.
ai-rag.settings.public_url.title: Public URL
ai-rag.settings.public_url.description: Enable public access to your AI Search and configure security settings.
ai-rag.settings.public_url.rate_limiting: Limit the number of requests to your public endpoint.
ai-rag.settings.public_url.authorized_ho: You are opening this endpoint to the public internet.
To prevent unauthorized access, you can add an authenticated host to restrict traffic to known sources.
ai-rag.settings.public_url.mcp_server_de: Expose this AI Search as an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server.
ai-rag.settings.public_url.search_endpoi: Enable the /search endpoint for direct search queries.
ai-rag.settings.public_url.chat_completi: Enable the /chat/completions endpoint for OpenAI-compatible chat.
ai-rag.settings.public_url.custom_domain: Add a custom domain that aliases this public endpoint. Requests to the domain resolve to the same configuration.
Must be a verified zone on this account. After saving, point this hostname at your public endpoint with a CNAME record.
Enter a valid fully-qualified domain name, for example search.example.com.
A CNAME record pointing %{hostname} to %{target} will be created automatically.
Your custom domain was saved, but we could not add the DNS record automatically.
Something went wrong while creating the DNS record. Please try again or add it manually.
Add a CNAME record for %{hostname} pointing to %{target} in your DNS settings.
You don't have permission to modify DNS records for this zone.
Could not find a matching zone for this hostname on your account.
ai-rag.settings.public_url.drawer.title: Configure Public URL
ai-rag.settings.public_url.drawer.descri: Configure rate limiting and authorized hosts for public access.
ai-rag.settings.public_url.drawer.reques: Maximum number of requests allowed in the specified period
ai-rag.settings.public_url.drawer.period: Select the time period for rate limiting
ai-rag.settings.public_url.drawer.techni: Fixed window: simple counter resets at fixed intervals. Sliding window: more precise, considers rolling time window
ai-rag.settings.public_url.drawer.author: Authorized hosts
List of hosts authorized to access this AI Search (one per line)

example.com
*.example.com
ai-rag.settings.general.title: General
ai-rag.settings.general.name: Name
ai-rag.settings.general.sync_interval_dr: How often the source data is re-synced.
ai-rag.settings.general.move_namespace.d: Move this instance to a different namespace. The instance URL will change after moving.
ai-rag.settings.general.move_namespace.n: No other namespaces available. Create a new namespace first.
ai-rag.settings.general.namespace_descri: Move this instance to a different namespace or create a new one.
ai-rag.settings.general.delete_rag: Permanently delete this AI Search and the associated Vector Database.
ai-rag.settings.general.delete.modal_war: This permanently deletes this AI Search instance and the associated Vector Database. This can't be undone.
ai-rag.settings.general.delete.error: There was a problem deleting this instance. Please try again.
ai-rag.settings.general.drawer.title: Service API Token
ai-rag.settings.general.drawer.new_token: This enables AI Search to create and access resources in your account.
ai-rag.settings.custom_metadata.title: Custom Metadata
ai-rag.settings.custom_metadata.descript: Add custom metadata fields to your AI Search instance for filtering and organization.
ai-rag.settings.custom_metadata.drawer.d: Manage custom metadata for your AI Search instance. Maximum 5 entries allowed.
ai-rag.settings.custom_metadata.drawer.n: Updating the custom metadata settings will trigger a full re-index of your AI Search instance after you Save.
ai-rag.playground.common.try_question: Try asking a question to get started
ai-rag.playground.common.image.unsupport: Unsupported image type. Use PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, BMP, or TIFF.
ai-rag.playground.common.image.too_large: Image is too large. The maximum size is 10 MB.
ai-rag.playground.common.errors.no_respo: No response received from the model.
ai-rag.playground.common.errors.connecti: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
ai-rag.playground.common.errors.not_foun: Either the data has not yet been indexed or no data is available for this specific search.
ai-rag.playground.common.errors.authenti: Authentication failed. Please go to %{link} and create a new API token for this instance.
ai-rag.playground.common.errors.api.work: Workers AI took too long to respond. Please try again.
ai-rag.playground.common.errors.api.ai_g: AI Gateway took too long to respond. Please try again.
AI Gateway is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
ai-rag.playground.common.errors.api.inva: The requested AI model is invalid or unavailable.
ai-rag.playground.common.errors.api.auto: AI Search not found. Please try again later.
ai-rag.playground.common.errors.api.work: Workers AI failed to generate a valid response. Please try again.
ai-rag.playground.common.errors.api.fail: Failed to search the Vectorize index. Please try again.
ai-rag.playground.sidebar.title: Playground settings
ai-rag.playground.sidebar.generation_mod: Select an LLM model to generate the responses.
ai-rag.playground.sidebar.match_threshol: Control the minimum score required for a result to be considered a match. Higher = stricter matching.
ai-rag.playground.sidebar.max_results.de: Control the maximum number of results that can be returned for each query. Higher = more results.
ai-rag.playground.sidebar.context_expans: Control the amount of surrounding context returned with each chunk. Higher = more context.
ai-rag.playground.sidebar.filter.title: Metadata filters
ai-rag.playground.sidebar.filter.modal_d: Filter search results by metadata fields attached to your indexed content.
ai-rag.playground.search.card.title: Title
ai-rag.playground.search.no_results_desc: Try adjusting your search query or settings and search again
ai-rag.playground.chat.clear_confirm_des: This will permanently delete the conversation history for this instance.
ai-rag.jobs.title: Jobs
ai-rag.jobs.description: Performs a full scan of all documents to update.
ai-rag.jobs.table.empty: There are no AI Search created
ai-rag.jobs.sync_modal.title: Sync index
ai-rag.jobs.sync_modal.description: Start a full sync of your data source. You can optionally add a note to this job.
ai-rag.jobs.sync_modal.note_placeholder: Add an optional note for this sync job...
ai-rag.overview_rag.total_index.title: Total index results
ai-rag.overview_rag.jobs.title: Last job
ai-rag.overview_rag.logs.title: Indexed items
ai-rag.snippet_card.title: Try Our Search Components
ai-rag.snippet_card.description: Connect your data and deliver natural language search in your applications. Beautiful, customizable components with zero dependencies.
ai-rag.managed_banner.title: Get Started with AI Search
ai-rag.managed_banner.description: Your AI Search instance comes with built-in storage. Upload a file to get started.
ai-rag.semantic_cache.close_enough.title: Strong
ai-rag.fusion_method.rrf.title: Reciprocal Rank Fusion
ai-rag.fusion_method.rrf.description: Combines results by merging rankings from both search methods.
ai-rag.fusion_method.max.title: Maximum score
ai-rag.fusion_method.max.description: Uses the highest score from either vector or keyword search.
ai-rag.keyword_match_mode.description: Choose how your search terms should be combined.
ai-rag.keyword_match_mode.and.title: AND
ai-rag.keyword_match_mode.and.descriptio: Show only results that contain all of your search terms.
ai-rag.keyword_match_mode.or.title: OR
ai-rag.keyword_match_mode.or.description: Show results that contain at least one of your search terms.
ai-rag.keyword_match_mode.exact_match.de: Show only results that contain your search terms exactly as written.
ai-rag.keyword_match_mode.fuzzy_match.de: Show results that contain your search terms with minor variations.
ai-rag.keyword_tokenizer.porter.title: Standard with Stemming (Porter)
ai-rag.keyword_tokenizer.porter.descript: Breaks text into words and reduces them to their root form (e.g., "connections" becomes "connect"). Best for natural language.
ai-rag.keyword_tokenizer.trigram.title: Character Trigram
ai-rag.keyword_tokenizer.trigram.descrip: Breaks text into sequences of three characters (e.g., "apple" becomes "app, ppl, ple"). Best for partial matches, IDs, and code.
ai-rag.errors.sync_in_cooldown: Synchronization process is in cooldown, wait a moment and try again
ai-rag.errors.custom_domain_not_a_verifi: That domain is not a verified zone on this account. Add and verify the zone, then try again.
ai-rag.errors.custom_domain_already_in_u: That domain is already in use by another AI Search instance.
ai-rag.errors.custom_domain_provisioning: We could not provision a certificate for that domain. Please try again.
ai-rag.errors.custom_domains_require_an_: Enable the public endpoint before adding a custom domain.
ai-rag.common.delete_msg: Deleting this AI Search is permanent. Deleting this AI Search will also delete the associated Vector database
ai-rag.tokens_page.title: API Tokens
ai-rag.tokens_page.description: Manage the API tokens used by AI Search to access resources in your account.
ai-rag.tokens_page.existing_token: You already have an API token.
ai-rag.tokens_page.no_tokens_description: Create an API token to allow AI Search to access resources in your account.
ai-rag.tokens_page.token_created_note: Copy this token now. For security, it will not be shown again.
ai-rag.tokens_page.error_description: An error occurred while loading your API tokens. Please try again.
ai-rag.r2_required.title: R2 Subscription Required
ai-rag.r2_required.description: AI Search requires an R2 subscription to store and manage the data for your AI Search pipelines. Please enable R2 to continue.
ai-rag.namespaces.title: Namespaces
ai-rag.namespaces.description: Manage namespaces to organize your AI Search instances.
ai-rag.namespaces.create.title: Create a new namespace
ai-rag.namespaces.create.name_descriptio: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only. Must start and end with a letter or digit. Max 28 characters.
ai-rag.namespaces.create.name_duplicate: A namespace with this name already exists
ai-rag.namespaces.edit.title: Edit description
ai-rag.namespaces.delete.title: Delete namespace
ai-rag.namespaces.delete.description_pre: Are you sure you want to delete
ai-rag.namespaces.delete.description_suf: ? All instances must be moved or deleted first.
ai-rag.namespaces.table.columns.name: Name
ai-rag.namespace_page.playground.none_se: No instances selected. Pick up to 10 to search.
ai-rag.namespace_page.playground.drawer_: Choose up to 10 instances to search across this namespace.
ai-rag.namespace_page.playground.no_inst: Create an instance from the overview tab.
No instances available in this namespace.
ai-rag.namespace_page.settings.delete.de: Permanently delete this namespace and everything inside it.
ai-rag.namespace_page.settings.delete.ca: Deleting this namespace also deletes every instance inside it. This can't be undone.
ai-rag.namespace_page.settings.delete.de: The default namespace can't be deleted.
ai-rag.namespace_page.settings.delete.mo: This permanently deletes the namespace and all %{count} instances inside it. This can't be undone.
This permanently deletes the %{namespaceName} namespace. This can't be undone.
ai-rag.namespace_page.settings.delete.lo: Couldn't load this namespace's instances. Close the dialog and try again.
ai-rag.namespace_page.settings.delete.mo: These instances couldn't be deleted: %{names}. The namespace was not deleted — fix the errors and try again.
ai-rag.namespace_page.settings.delete.na: The instances were deleted, but the namespace couldn't be removed. Try again.
ai-rag.create_instance.title: Create Instance
ai-rag.create_instance.choose_source.des: Select where AI Search will index your data from. You can change this later.
ai-rag.create_instance.choose_source.man: Upload and manage files directly. Always available as the default storage for every instance.
ai-rag.create_instance.choose_source.r2_: Index files stored in one of your existing R2 buckets.
Enable R2 to use this source type.
ai-rag.create_instance.choose_source.web: Crawl and index content from a website URL or sitemap.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.r2_: Choose the R2 bucket that contains your data.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.tok: An AI Search API token will be automatically created for this instance.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.web: Enter the website URL to crawl. AI Search will index the content it finds.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.url: Enter a domain or URL. Include a subdomain if needed.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.dep: Maximum number of pages to crawl (1–100,000).
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.max: Maximum age of cached content in seconds.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.par: Reads your sitemap.xml to discover and index pages systematically.
Follows links from a starting URL to discover and index pages.
How AI Search discovers pages. Sitemap reads your sitemap.xml; Web Crawl follows links.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.dep: Maximum number of link-hops from the start URL. Higher values discover more pages.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.max: How long (in seconds) cached crawl content is considered fresh before re-crawling.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.inc: Whether to follow and index links that point to other domains.
Whether to include pages on subdomains of the crawl target URL.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.par: Static uses basic HTTP fetching. Rendered uses a headless browser for JavaScript-rendered pages.
Fast and cost-efficient. Best for plain HTML pages.
Uses a headless browser. Best for JavaScript-rendered content.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.ext: Add custom HTTP headers sent with every crawl request. Useful for authentication.
Header key contains invalid characters. Use letters, digits, hyphens, and underscores only.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.spe: Specify exact sitemap URLs instead of relying on automatic discovery.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.cra: Which links to follow when crawling the target domain.
Follow all discovered links — both sitemap and page links.
Follow only links discovered via sitemaps.
Follow only links found on crawled pages.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.con: Map URL glob patterns to CSS selectors to extract specific content. The first matching path wins.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_config.web: Configure content extraction, URL filters, and custom metadata for your crawl.
ai-rag.create_instance.review_config.des: All settings below use smart defaults.
ai-rag.create_instance.review_config.ai_: Connect an AI Gateway to monitor model usage and unlock additional providers via BYOK. Changing this resets available models.
ai-rag.create_instance.review_config.emb: Converts your content into vector embeddings. Affects search quality and cost.
ai-rag.create_instance.review_config.chu: Number of tokens per chunk. Smaller = more precise results; larger = more context per result.
Token overlap between adjacent chunks to maintain context continuity across boundaries.
ai-rag.create_instance.review_config.hyb: Combines vector similarity search with BM25 keyword search for improved relevance.

Hybrid search combines vector and keyword search, requiring two search pipelines. This reduces the maximum results per query compared to vector-only search, as results from both pipelines are merged using the selected fusion method.
ai-rag.create_instance.review_config.fus: How vector and keyword scores are merged. RRF (Reciprocal Rank Fusion) is the default and works well in most cases.
ai-rag.create_instance.review_config.key: Exact match requires all keywords to be present. Fuzzy match allows partial or approximate matches.
How text is tokenized for keyword search. Porter stemming is best for natural language; trigram is best for partial matches and IDs.
ai-rag.create_instance.review_config.gen: The LLM used to generate the final natural language answer from retrieved chunks.
ai-rag.create_instance.review_config.que: Automatically rewrites the user query before retrieval to improve relevance and recall.
ai-rag.create_instance.review_config.rew: The model used to rewrite the query. Defaults to the generation model if left empty.
ai-rag.create_instance.review_config.rer: Re-scores retrieved chunks using a dedicated model to improve relevance ranking before generation.
The model used to re-rank retrieved chunks. Only reranking-type models are available.
ai-rag.create_instance.review_config.max: Maximum number of content chunks retrieved from the index per query. Higher = more results but slower.
ai-rag.create_instance.review_config.sco: Minimum similarity score (0–1) required for a chunk to be included in results. Higher = stricter matching.
ai-rag.create_instance.review_config.cac: Caches responses for semantically similar queries to reduce model calls and cost.
How similar two queries must be to reuse a cached response instead of calling the model.
How long cached responses are kept before expiring. Longer TTLs reduce model calls but may serve staler results.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_settings.d: Optionally set path filters, custom metadata fields, and choose your API token.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_settings.p: Control which files to index by specifying include and exclude patterns.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_settings.i: Only index files matching these wildcard patterns (e.g. */docs/*, *.pdf). Leave empty to include all.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_settings.e: Skip files matching these wildcard patterns. Applied after include rules.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_settings.i: Invalid pattern. Use wildcards like */docs/* or *.pdf.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_settings.c: Define additional metadata fields to attach to indexed documents.
ai-rag.create_instance.source_settings.t: Select an existing AI Search token or create a new one automatically.
ai-rag.create_instance.name_create.title: Name your instance
ai-rag.create_instance.name_create.descr: Give your AI Search instance a unique name. This cannot be changed after creation.
ai-rag.create_instance.name_create.name_: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
ai-rag.create_instance.name_create.token: An AI Search API token will be automatically created for this instance.
ai-rag.create_instance.name_and_source.d: Give your AI Search instance a name and optionally connect a data source.
ai-rag.create_instance.name_and_source.b: Optionally connect an additional data source.
ai-rag.create_instance.confirm_create.de: Review your choices and create your AI Search instance.
